title: Bus services at 50% in the face of Fuel Crisis
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The Lanka Private Bus Owners’ Association said that bus services are still operating at 50%.
The Chairman of the Lanka Private Bus Owners Association Gemunu Wijeratne said that steps will be taken to operate bus services as usual.
Meanwhile, the Sri Lanka Transport Board (SLTB) further said that bus services are in operation without any issue.
SLTB said it had sufficient fuel reserves to operate the bus service.
